Skip to contents
cliomicplot 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
  • Changelog

Package index

Core engine

The main plotting function and layer helpers.

cliplot()
Publication-Ready Plots for Clinical and Multi-Omics Data
cliplot_add()
Add Layers to an Existing Cliomicplot
cliplot_interactive()
Interactive Plot Mode
cli_markdown()
Enable Markdown Rendering in Plot Text Elements

Themes & parameters

clitheme()
Set or Reset Plot Themes for cliomicplot
clipar()
Set or Query Cliomicplot Graphical Parameters
clitheme_list()
List Available Themes
clitheme_md()
Enable Markdown Globally for the Active Theme
clitheme_md_reset()
Disable Global Markdown Rendering
clitheme_register()
Register a Custom Theme
clitheme_unregister()
Unregister a Custom Theme

Palettes

cli_palette_list()
List Available Cliomicplot Palettes
cli_palette_show()
Show a Cliomicplot Palette
palette_scale() scale_color_cli() scale_fill_cli() scale_color_cli_c() scale_fill_cli_c()
Build a ggplot2 Scale from a Cliomicplot Palette
gradient_pal()
Generate a smooth color gradient

Clinical plot types

type_volcano()
Volcano Plot Type
type_forest()
Forest Plot Type
type_km()
Kaplan-Meier Survival Curve Type
type_waterfall()
Waterfall Plot Type
type_swimmer()
Swimmer Plot Type

Omics plot types

type_heatmap()
Heatmap Type
type_pca()
PCA Plot Type
type_ma()
MA Plot Type
type_correlation()
Correlation Matrix Plot Type
type_boxplot()
Boxplot Type
type_violin()
Violin Plot Type

General plot types

type_abline()
Reference Lines Type
type_alluvial()
Alluvial / Sankey Diagram Type
type_barplot()
Bar plot type
type_beeswarm()
Beeswarm Plot Type
type_boxplot()
Boxplot Type
type_bubble()
Bubble Chart Type
type_chord()
Chord Diagram Type
type_circular_bar()
Circular Barplot Type
type_connected()
Connected Scatterplot Type
type_correlation()
Correlation Matrix Plot Type
type_dendrogram()
Dendrogram Type
type_density()
Density plot type
type_density2d()
2D Density / Contour Plot Type
type_dumbbell()
Dumbbell Plot Type
type_errorbar()
Error bar type (requires ymin and ymax)
type_forest()
Forest Plot Type
type_heatmap()
Heatmap Type
type_histogram()
Histogram type
type_infobar()
Infographic Bar Chart
type_jitter()
Jitter Plot Type
type_km()
Kaplan-Meier Survival Curve Type
type_lines()
Line plot type
type_lm()
Linear Model Fit Type
type_loess()
LOESS Smoothing Type
type_lollipop()
Lollipop Chart Type
type_ma()
MA Plot Type
type_parallel()
Parallel Coordinates Plot Type
type_pca()
PCA Plot Type
type_points()
Scatter plot type
type_qq()
Q-Q Plot Type
type_radar()
Radar / Spider Chart Type
type_raincloud()
Raincloud Plot Type
type_ribbon()
Ribbon/area plot type
type_ridge()
Ridgeline Plot Type
type_rug()
Rug Plot Type
type_spineplot()
Spine Plot / Spinogram Type
type_streamgraph()
Streamgraph / Streamchart Type
type_swimmer()
Swimmer Plot Type
type_text()
Text/Label Plot Type
type_treemap()
Treemap Type
type_trials()
Clinical Trials Pipeline Stacked Bar Chart
type_violin()
Violin Plot Type
type_volcano()
Volcano Plot Type
type_waffle()
Waffle Chart Type
type_waterfall()
Waterfall Plot Type
